summary: Face Match Accept/Decline confirmation flow testing completed successfully. All 7 test features verified: Face Match button on card back, SelfieMatchModal with Accept/Decline dialog, decline warning with cost info (100 BL), camera view with attempts counter (3/3), and face detection overlay.

VERIFIED: 'Accept Photo Face Match Now' button proceeds to camera view

VERIFIED: Camera view shows 'Attempts: 3/3' and 'Cost: 100 BL'
VERIFIED: Face detection overlay/guide oval visible in camera view

context_for_next_testing_agent: Face Match Accept/Decline confirmation flow fully verified. Test photo mint_test_a1d75b2038d747fe (Ocean Sunset) has has_face=true and selfie_match_completed=false. The Face Match button appears on the BACK of the UnifiedPhotoCard after flipping (click 'Tap to flip'). SelfieMatchModal shows Accept/Decline confirmation dialog BEFORE camera view. Decline warning shows cost info (100 BL per try). Camera view shows attempts (3/3) and cost (100 BL). Camera access won't work in headless browser testing.
